quotes:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

rules.intent: Enforce the approved brand color palette and usage priority.
rules.rule_text: The three approved brand colors, in hierarchy order, are: (1) Deep Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) as the dominant color, (2) Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) as the secondary accent, and (3) Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) as the tertiary accent.

quotes:
Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Enforce the approved typeface roles for headlines and body copy.
rules.rule_text: Agenda (headline.font = Agenda) is the primary headline font and must be used for all headlines and headers; Nunito Sans (body.font = Nunito Sans) must be used for all body copy in print.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

rules.intent: Enforce the locked CTA shape and gradient treatment.
rules.rule_text: CTAs must use the approved SVG shape and treatment (cta.svg.shape = 180 × 59) filled with the light-to-dark gold gradient (cta.svg.fill, #FFDF55 → #FAA21B).
